meaning: n.行板,缓慢的曲子adj.缓慢的adv.缓慢地
examples: At the church of the Trinity in Cherbourg on Christmas Day, 1892, he had his debut as a composer with the performance of his andante for string trio and organ.
The middle movement, called Intermezzo, is an Andante grazioso with light staccatos and melodic grace.
